posts.author: euphrates
posts.content:
@GSPGOAT123 might be rumored no doubt about it but i don't think ufc will allow some sort of a nostalgiaslop at that level of competition and as much as others think it makes sense i heavily doubt it since conor has horrible cardio as of now and haven't properly trained for half a decade and masvidal on the other hand is on a 4 fight losing streak and it would be 5 if we add him losing to nate diaz in boxing out of all people(remind you once again he lost to nate in striking), hence this is why i said it doesn't make any sense because it's going to be one-sided and the worst part is we don't know who has the clear advantage here, both of them might aswell gas out in the 2. round

posts.author: euphrates

posts.author: Gilpin
posts.content:
@euphrates The UFC would for sure do some nostalgiaslop if it meant Conor Mcgregor coming back, especially under the new Paramount profit oriented system, they know Mcgregor could easily pull in 5 times the viewers 325 or 326 brought in, they could also make this a BMF fight if they wanted to give it some fake reason as to why two unranked fighters are headlining a pay per view. I think if they did do this they would put a fight for hardcore fans as the co main like Yan vs Merab III or Volk vs. Evloev and probably a womens championship as well. I think theres just simply no way Mcgregor ever fights in the UFC again without being the headliner, and me personally I would like to see a comeback, so I wouldnt be upset if he was on this card.

* Edited at 03.30.2026, 11:43 PM ET *

posts.author: Gilpin
posts.content: @The Duck Yeah but you have to keep in mind this is IFW, so the UFC definitely could do a McGregor fight and a title fight, and given the history of the UFC putting bantamweight title fights as comain, I wouldnt be surprised if the Yan vs Merab trilogy fight was on this card. Plus, Dana already said Islam would be fighting in August, and Volk vs Evloev just isnt a strong enough headliner for IFW.

posts.author: The Duck
posts.content:
Can they put McGregor with a relevant Lightweight or Welterweight and it be competitive because I prefer that, I think Holloway or Pimblett is the matchup to make as they are fan favourites top ranked fighters

Pimblett might be the smarter choice because if McGregor look bad, It would help build Paddy stock. But I think it winnable for Conor

posts.author: GSPGOAT123
posts.content: It’s a weird situation because you can’t justify having two washed fighters as the main event let alone for the IFW card. But at the same time there’s no way they would have it on the undercard.

posts.author: The Giraffe
posts.content:
Food for thought:

If Evloev fought in July, it would represent the quickest turnaround of his UFC career.  If history can serve as a guide whatsoever, he won't fight again until January 2027.  It's been an average of 9+ months between fights for him.  He's coming off his first five rounder in almost 8 years where he got a little dinged up, and his next fight is the biggest of his career.
